    1. lwp_gettid()

Class DragonFlyBsdLibcFunctions

java.lang.Object
oshi.ffm.ForeignFunctions
oshi.ffm.platform.unix.dragonflybsd.DragonFlyBsdLibcFunctions
public final class DragonFlyBsdLibcFunctions extends ForeignFunctions
FFM bindings for DragonFly BSD-specific libc functions. DragonFly shares most of its libc surface with FreeBSD, so shared functions (sysctlbyname, sysctl, getpid, getrlimit, etc.) are called via FreeBsdLibcFunctions. This class adds only the DragonFly-specific lwp_gettid() (FreeBSD uses thr_self instead).

  • Method Details

    • lwp_gettid

      public static int lwp_gettid() throws Throwable
      Calls lwp_gettid() — returns the kernel thread ID of the calling LWP.
      Returns:
      the kernel thread ID, or -1 on error
      Throws:
      Throwable - on FFM invocation error
